query: SELECT fo.id, fo.fieldId, fo.value, fo.label, ff.fieldKey, ff.fieldType FROM fieldOptions fo JOIN formFields ff ON fo.fieldId = ff.id WHERE ff.fieldKey LIKE '%site%' OR ff.fieldKey LIKE '%location%' LIMIT 20;
